# Devien George — Full-Stack Software Engineer

> Devien George is a Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience based in Cairo, Egypt. He builds and scales production web platforms, having served 1,000+ daily users across 24 organizations.

## About

- Name: Devien George Francis
- Title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
- Location: Cairo, Egypt
- Email: deviengeorge99@gmail.com
- Website: https://deviengeorge.me
- GitHub: https://github.com/deviengeorge
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/deviengeorge
- Education: BS in Computer Science & Statistics, University of Helwan (2020–2026)

## Expertise

- Full-Stack Web Development (4+ years)
- Backend: Laravel, Node.js (Express, NestJS, AdonisJS), Spring Boot, .NET
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, Angular, TypeScript
- Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Nginx, Linux
- Architecture: Microservices, Event-Driven Systems, Multi-Tenant Platforms

## Key Projects

### Regional Church System (2023–Present)
Multi-tenant church management platform serving 24 churches with 1,000+ daily users. Built with Laravel, FilamentPHP, React, MySQL, Docker, and Redis.

### Hessah System (2024–2025)
EdTech SaaS for private tutors. Attendance, payments, exam analytics, parent notifications. Laravel, FilamentPHP.

### ALReserve (2026–Present)
Luxury accommodation booking platform for GCC travelers. React 19, Hono, Bun, Supabase, TypeScript monorepo.

## Teaching

Mentored 70+ students across 5+ institutions including AMIT Learning, Konecta, StemEC, and Senior Steps. Taught full-stack development, microservices, Java, Spring Boot, C#, .NET, React, Laravel, and Node.js.

## Current Status

Available for full-stack engineering roles, contract work, and technical consulting. Open to remote positions worldwide.
